query:
CREATE TABLE `whatsapp_admin_users` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`phoneNumber` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	`role` enum('admin','super_admin') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'admin',
	`isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `whatsapp_admin_users_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `whatsapp_admin_users_phoneNumber_unique` UNIQUE(`phoneNumber`)
);

CREATE TABLE `whatsapp_command_permissions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`command` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`requiredRole` enum('admin','super_admin') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'admin',
	`description` text,
	`isEnabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `whatsapp_command_permissions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `whatsapp_command_permissions_command_unique` UNIQUE(`command`)
);

INSERT INTO `whatsapp_command_permissions` (`command`, `requiredRole`, `description`, `isEnabled`) VALUES
('/help', 'admin', 'List all available commands', true),
('/status', 'admin', 'Get project status by name', true),
('/project', 'admin', 'Get full project details with PDF option', true),
('/list', 'admin', 'List active projects (10 per page)', true),
('/weekly', 'admin', 'Get weekly schedule for current week', true),
('/pending', 'admin', 'List pending approvals and items', true),
('/report', 'admin', 'Generate project report as PDF', true);
